predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Donald Trump will be the next president of the United States either by vote or by force.
predictions.context: Bob is expressing his belief about the 2024 election outcome, stating that Trump will win, implying force is a possibility if the vote doesn't go his way.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Trump is elected, I think it is a matter of about one year until the United States is very closely aligned with Iran, Russia and North Korea. And that becomes the new world order.
predictions.context: Chad is speculating on the geopolitical realignment he believes will follow a Trump victory in 2024.
predictions.timeframe: within about one year of Trump's potential inauguration

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump was our president, this fucking war [in Gaza] never would have started.
predictions.context: Mary Lou is asserting that the Israel-Hamas war would not have occurred under a Trump presidency.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I think this [the Gaza war] will probably be over by the time he [Trump] is sworn in.
predictions.context: Chad is predicting the Gaza conflict will end before a potential Trump inauguration in January 2025.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Biden stays our president, the country that we know it is no longer here. It's gone.
predictions.context: Mary Lou is predicting the end of America as we know it if Biden is re-elected.
predictions.timeframe: unspecified (during a potential second Biden term)

predictions.speaker: Haley Popp
predictions.prediction: Now they're coming for IVF. Then it's going to be birth control. Then women can't own shit like gay marriage is going to be fucking overturned.
predictions.context: Haley is predicting a sequence of rights being rolled back following the overturning of Roe v. Wade, specifically targeting IVF, birth control, and gay marriage.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: I think you'll have that [a situation like Putin's Russia] with Trump almost immediately. And then I think he's going to get the Supreme Court to say like two terms. No, you can do three.
predictions.context: Chad predicts Trump will attempt to extend his presidency beyond two terms, similar to Putin, and will get the Supreme Court to allow it.
predictions.timeframe: unspecified (during/after a potential second Trump term)

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: If Donald Trump is not elected, there will be a civil war. There are some type of a war to take the country back.
predictions.context: Mary Lou predicts violent conflict if Trump loses the 2024 election.

predictions.speaker: Bob Kultgen
predictions.prediction: He [Hunter Biden] will get off no matter what he says, no matter what he does. The DOJ will not prosecute him. He will get off. This will go nowhere.
predictions.context: Bob is predicting the outcome of the Hunter Biden investigation, asserting he will face no legal consequences.

predictions.speaker: Chad Kultgen
predictions.prediction: Third parties in this country, at least during my lifetime, have had no ability to gain ground or take foothold.
predictions.context: Chad is making a general prediction about the continued failure of third-party political movements in the US.

predictions.speaker: Mary Lou Kultgen
predictions.prediction: The border will be the most important issue of this election.
predictions.context: Mary Lou is predicting that immigration will be the top issue in the 2024 presidential election.
